name: Randy Crawford
abstract: Veronica "Randy" Crawford (born February 18, 1952) is an American retired jazz and R&B singer. She has been more successful in Europe than in the United States, where she has not entered the Billboard Hot 100 as a solo artist.

concerts.label: Jazz Concert: Billy Paul, Les McCann, and Randy Crawford

about_quotes.speaker: John Levy
about_quotes.evidence: When I was handling Randy Crawford, and her contract came up for Warner Bros.

about_quotes.evidence: Randy Crawford? I did the things for Randy Crawford, strings and woodwinds and all that, you know?
